title: MongoDB SA career framework
subtitle: One framework. Two views. What each role looks like — and what it needs to prove.

promotionGates.label: SA → Senior
promotionGates.question: "Are they making calls on their own?"

promotionGates.label: Senior → Advisory
promotionGates.question: "Do other SAs bring them their hardest problems?"

promotionGates.label: Advisory → Principal
promotionGates.question: "Would the region's capability drop if they left?"

timingRule: A promotion case needs to show the upper end of the current level and evidence of consistently operating at the next level for at least 2 quarters. Doing it once isn't ready. Doing it consistently — without being asked — is.
missedInsight: Promotion is not about doing more things. It is about owning things at a higher quality bar, with less direction, for a wider audience. A Senior SA who makes the team better as a side effect of their work is already Advisory.
